title: (Bullish Signal) BBY, price moved above its 50-day Moving Average on June 08, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This price move could indicate a change in the trend, and may be a buy signal for investors. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor found 42 similar cases, and 35 were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 83%. Current price $117.05 crossed the support line at $100.98 and is trading between $127.27 resistance and $100.98 support lines. Throughout the month of 05/06/21 - 06/08/21, the price experienced a -2% Downtrend, while the week of 06/01/21 - 06/08/21 shows a +3% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/2le1rucbj9471.png?width=1523&format=png&auto=webp&s=4730e26bc26bf1a76e1368aa3e14a633c181ef00

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. 34 of 42 cases where BBY's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 81%.

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on June 02, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on BBY as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 62 of 88 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 70%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for BBY just turned positive on June 07, 2021. Looking at past instances where BBY's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise in 32 of 48 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 67%.

Following a +1.92% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where BBY advanced for three days, in 291 of 383 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 76%.
